positive: A highly stylized celestial botanical scene featuring intertwined glowing roots, crescent moons, and minimalist constellations set against a deep indigo night sky. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, dominated by geometric silhouettes and clean line work. Use a vibrant, limited palette of teal, magenta, deep navy, and metallic gold accents. The style must emulate sophisticated mid-century modern poster art combined with vector illustration aesthetics. The lighting should be dramatic and high-contrast, with soft neon glow effects emanating only from the flora and stars. Full bleed, perfect for apparel printing.
